Parley 0.2.0

- Usage & Cost dashboard: LLM (cache-aware token pricing) + transcription (per audio-minute) cost, split by provider with pie charts and day/week/month filters.
- Lower transcription cost: diarizing providers (Soniox/Deepgram) mix mic+system into one stream and rely on diarization, halving STT cost.
- Transcription provider picker (Soniox, Deepgram, AssemblyAI, OpenAI, Gemini) with a no-diarization warning.
- Built-in MCP server exposes the live session (transcript, todos, evaluations) and supports live mutation of todos/evaluations from an MCP client.
- User profile (name/role/company) injected into meeting prompts.
- Default evaluation templates for the five core use-cases (job interview, salary negotiation, sales call, deal-making, diligence) plus a topic-shift / focus-dilution detector.
- Post-meeting debrief: holistic report with clickable [m:ss] timestamps that jump back to the transcript, expandable to a large window.
- First-run onboarding wizard (language, AI model, transcription, macOS permissions, profile).
